channel.title: 2026-05-14 AI × Science 文献日报 RSS
channel.description: 2026-05-14 当天筛选出的 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉文献 RSS。

item.title: 基于机器学习与DFT从电子结构预测难熔高熵合金的力学性能
item.description:
📚 ScienceDirect
该工作结合密度泛函理论计算和机器学习方法，利用电子结构特征作为描述符预测难熔高熵合金的力学性能，建立电子结构—力学性能映射关系以指导合金设计。

item.title: 通过La掺杂调控热障陶瓷SrZrO₃的热导率：基于机器学习势的计算研究
item.description:
📚 ScienceDirect
该研究构建机器学习原子间势，对La掺杂SrZrO₃热障陶瓷进行分子动力学模拟，考察掺杂浓度对声子输运及热导率的调控作用，为低导热热障涂层设计提供理论依据。

item.title: 基于机器学习原子间势理解SEI无机组分LiF和Li₂O的热导率
item.description:
📚 ScienceDirect
该研究利用机器学习原子间势对锂离子电池固体电解质界面层（SEI）中关键无机组分LiF和Li₂O的晶格热输运行为进行分子动力学模拟，揭示其热导率特征及对SEI热稳定性的影响。

item.title: Reducing cross-sample prediction churn in scientific machine learning
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Gordan Prastalo, Kevin Maik Jablonka
arXiv:2605.13826v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Scientific machine learning reports predictive performance. It does not report whether the same prediction would survive a different draw of training data. Across 9 chemistry benchmarks, two classifiers trained on independent bootstraps of the same training set agree on aggregate accuracy to within 1.3--4.2 percentage points but disagree on the class label of 8.0--21.8% of test molecules. We call this gap emphcross-sample prediction churn. The standard parameter-side techniques (deep ensembles, MC dropout, stochastic weight averaging) do not reduce this gap; two data-side methods do. The first is K-bootstrap bagging, which cuts the rate 40--54% on every dataset at no accuracy cost (K×-ERM compute). The second is emphtwin-bootstrap, our pro…

item.title: Deep learning-assisted weak beam identification in Dark-field X-ray microscopy
item.description:
📚 npj Computational Materials
👤 A. Benhadjira, C. Detlefs, S. Borgi, V. Favre-Nicolin, C. Yildirim
npj Computational Materials, Published online: 14 May 2026; doi:10.1038/s41524-026-02127-5 Deep learning-assisted weak beam identification in Dark-field X-ray microscopy

item.title: 基于深度学习掩码自编码器预测金属有机框架的CO₂工作容量
item.description:
📚 ScienceDirect
该研究构建了基于掩码自编码器的深度学习模型，用于预测金属有机框架（MOFs）的CO₂工作容量，旨在加速面向碳捕集应用的MOF筛选。具体方法与结果详见原文。

item.title: 基于多特征晶体图卷积神经网络的钙钛矿带隙预测
item.description:
📚 ScienceDirect
该工作在晶体图卷积神经网络（CGCNN）框架中融合多种特征，用于钙钛矿材料的带隙预测，以提升预测精度并辅助光电材料筛选，详细模型与性能见原文。

item.title: 面向弹性血管血流的积分守恒物理信息神经网络的流固耦合训练
item.description:
📚 ScienceDirect
针对弹性血管中血流问题，本文提出一种结合流固耦合的积分守恒型物理信息神经网络（PINN）训练方法。该方法将守恒律以积分形式嵌入网络损失，并耦合血管壁形变，提高了对血流动力学的求解精度与稳定性。

item.title: Force-Aware Neural Tangent Kernels for Scalable and Robust Active Learning of MLIPs
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Eszter Varga-Umbrich, Zachary Weller-Davies, Paul Duckworth, Jules Tilly, Olivier Peltre, Shikha Surana
arXiv:2605.13788v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Active learning for machine-learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) must address several challenges to be practical: scaling to large candidate pools, leveraging energy-force supervision, and maintaining robustness when candidate pools are biased relative to the target distribution. In this work, we jointly address these challenges. We first introduce a linearly scaling acquisition framework based on chunked feature-space posterior-variance shortlisting. By avoiding materialisation of the candidate and train set kernels, this approach enables screening of ~200k structures within hours and applies broadly to acquisition strategies that score candidates based on molecular similarity metrics. We then extend the Neural Tangent Kernel (NTK) to a…

item.title: Unified generalization analysis for physics informed neural networks
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Yuka Hashimoto, Tomoharu Iwata
arXiv:2605.13260v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs) and their variational counterparts (VPINNs) are neural networks that incorporate physical laws, making them useful for scientific problems. Existing generalization analyses for PINNs and VPINNs remain limited, often requiring restrictive assumptions such as stability conditions or linear ellipticity. In this paper, we derive generalization bounds for neural networks that involve differentiation with respect to input variables, covering PINNs and VPINNs under a unified framework. We apply Taylor expansion to represent nonlinear differential operators as linear operators on a high-dimensional space, enabling the use of Koopman-based analysis and showing that high-rank networks can generalize well even i…

item.title: Identifying the nonlinear string dynamics with port-Hamiltonian neural networks
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Maximino Linares, Guillaume Doras, Thomas Hélie
arXiv:2605.12785v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Hybrid machine learning combines physical knowledge with data-driven models to enhance interpretability and performance. In this context, Port-Hamiltonian Systems (PHS), which generalize Hamiltonian mechanics to describe open, non-autonomous dynamical systems, have been successfully integrated with neural networks under the name Port-Hamiltonian Neural Networks (PHNNs). While the ability of PHNNs to identify Hamiltonian ordinary differential equation (ODE) systems has already been demonstrated, their application to learning Hamiltonian partial differential equation (PDE) systems remains largely unexplored. This limitation restricts their use in musical acoustics, where instruments are typically modeled as distributed parameter systems govern…

item.title: Dual-Correction Physics-Informed Neural Networks for Hemodynamic Reconstruction from Sparse Data
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Jingtai Song, Qinsheng Zhu, Xiaodong Xing, Yufeng Tang, Zhiyun Zhang, Xianwen Zhang, Hao Wu
arXiv:2605.12544v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Quantifying hemodynamics in the curved segments of the intracranial internal carotid artery is a core challenge in diagnosing vascular stenosis. Conventional full-field imaging, such as 4D Flow MRI, is costly and difficult to widely promote. Meanwhile, reconstructing full-field fluid information from easily accessible and non-invasive sparse measurement data (such as transcranial Doppler ultrasound/computed tomography angiography) is essentially a highly challenging ill-posed inverse problem. To overcome the severe optimization difficulties and generalization failures of conventional physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) in highly tortuous geometries, we propose a dual-correction physics-informed neural network (DCP-INN) framework taking…

item.title: Chiral molecule-induced contributions to ferromagnetic resonance
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Jurgen Lindner, Pedro Contreras-Gallardo, Abhishek Singh, Ruslan Salikhov, Anna Semisalova, Olav Hellwig, Rodolfo Gallardo, Anna Lewandowska-Andralojc, Kilian Lenz, Aleksandra Lindner
arXiv:2605.13805v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Despite extensive research on chirality-driven spin selectivity, most studies have focused on static magnetic properties, while the influence of chirality on the dynamic magnetic response remains largely unexplored. Here, we investigate how chiral molecular interfaces affect magnetization dynamics in thin Co/Ni multilayers with perpendicular magnetic anisotropy using broadband ferromagnetic resonance spectroscopy. A comparison between bare (reference) films and molecule-functionalized (hybrid) samples reveals no measurable changes in either the resonance field or the linewidth that could be attributed to the presence of the chiral environment. Motivated by our findings we develop a macrospin description that distinguishes equilibrium modific…

item.title: Correlation-driven tunability of altermagnetism in RuO₂
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Ina Park, Dongwook Kim, Jisook Hong, Beomjoon Goh, Bo Gyu Jang
arXiv:2605.13559v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: RuO₂ has been regarded as a prototypical candidate for metallic altermagnet, offering a potential platform for high-speed and high-efficiency spintronics. However, the magnetic ground state of RuO₂ remains a topic of active debate due to conflicting experimental reports. In this work, we investigate the effect of electron correlations in RuO₂ using density functional theory combined with dynamical mean-field theory (DFT+DMFT). In contrast to previous DFT-based studies, DFT+DMFT captures essential dynamical correlation effects, yielding spectral functions and optical conductivities in excellent quantitative agreement with experiments, and further reveals that RuO₂ resides in the close vicinity of both the paramagnetic-altermagnetic phase boun…

item.title: Giant optical spin-orbit interactions in ferroelectric van der Waals waveguides
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Ding Xu, Saeed Rahmanian Koshkaki, Vicente Galicia, Chun-Ying Huang, Victoria Quirós-Cordero, Jakhangirkhodja A. Tulyagankhodjaev, André Koch Liston, Daniel G. Chica, Emma Lian, Amirhosein Amini, Yongseok Hong, Taketo Handa, P. James Schuck, Xiaoyang Zhu, Xavier Roy, Arkajit Mandal, Milan Delor
arXiv:2605.13707v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Optical spin-orbit interactions (SOI) link photonic spin to momentum, offering a route toward on-chip polarization control and beam steering. Nevertheless, achieving sufficient optical SOI and nonlinearities on sub-micrometer scales - a prerequisite for dense photonic integration - remains an outstanding challenge. Here, we show that highly birefringent van der Waals (vdW) waveguides provide an ideal, chip-compatible platform to address this limitation. We focus on the ferroelectric semiconductor NbOI2, which exhibits record optical nonlinearities and dielectric anisotropy. Using femtosecond optical microscopy, we image light propagation and harmonic conversion beyond the total internal reflection barrier over tens of micrometers in NbOI2 sl…

item.title: Negative Differential Resistance and Ultra-High TMR in Altermagnetic Tunnel Junctions
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Sajjan Sheoran, Luke Keenan, Declan Nell, Stefano Sanvito
arXiv:2605.12711v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Altermagnets can replace ferromagnets in tunnel junctions, yielding large tunneling magnetoresistance, ultrafast switching, and low-power functionality. While most studies explore the linear-response regime, interesting features emerge at finite bias, where the peculiar electronic structure of altermagnets gives rise to complex non-linear behaviour. Using non-equilibrium Green's functions implemented with density functional theory, we predict that a large low-bias negative differential resistance can be observed in an altermagnetic tunnel junction. Our proposed junction incorporates the orbital-ordered altermagnet KV2Se2O, whose quasi-2D Fermi surface plays a crucial role in realizing the negative differential resistance. Upon the applicatio…

item.title: 范德瓦尔斯室温铁磁体Fe₅GeTe₂中的各向异性电子-声子耦合与手性声子
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Smrutiranjan Mekap, Andrzej Ptok, Jyoti Saini, Changgu Lee, Subhasis Ghosh, Anushree Roy
通过温度、波长、偏振依赖的Raman测量结合第一性原理计算，揭示了F5GT的晶格动力学和电子-声子相互作用。角分辨Raman强度表明存在各向异性电子-声子耦合及自旋-轨道耦合介导的响应；Fano不对称峰的温度依赖反映耦合的热演化，波长依赖测量确认光学共振对各向异性相互作用的增强作用。

item.title: 表观铁电极化滞回与利用麦克风观测压电应变回线的简易方法
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Mamoru Fukunaga
本文指出与非铁电电容串联的额外组件即使在双波法（DWM）下也可产生表观铁电D-E滞回，并通过电路模型分析了伪回线特征，发现部分文献中存在可疑回线。作者提出利用廉价驻极体麦克风加上简单电路扩展来测量块体样品S-E回线的方法，并用商用陶瓷电容验证其D-E回线为伪回线。

item.title: 双二次与海森堡耦合在磁性隧道结分子自旋电子器件中的竞争效应
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Andoniaina Mariah Randriambololona, Hayden Brown, Eva Mutunga, Andrew Grizzle, Christopher DAngelo, Pawan Tyagi
针对磁性隧道结分子自旋电子器件（MTJMSD），采用三维海森堡模型蒙特卡洛模拟，在无分子海森堡耦合（HC）、强平行HC与强反平行HC三种情形下系统改变双二次耦合（BQC）强度。结果显示当存在强HC时BQC对总磁化影响甚微，HC主导器件磁化；仅有BQC时器件难以达到磁稳态。研究阐明了两类耦合的相对作用。

item.title: 基于含时密度泛函理论高效预测层状反铁磁体CrSBr的高度各向异性激子性质
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Ashwin Ramasubramaniam, Daniel Hernangómez-Pérez, Javier Junquera, María Camarasa-Gómez
采用带在位修正的调谐杂化泛函，作者以远低于自洽多体微扰理论的成本，准确再现了CrSBr的基本带隙、光学带隙及激子与磁序的耦合。利用此框架研究了外磁场致自旋倾斜引起的激子能移，为层状磁性材料中激子和磁光现象的建模提供高效方案。

item.title: 受挫枫叶格铁磁体中的非公度自旋密度波
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Paul L. Ebert, Yasir Iqbal, Alexander Wietek
针对Na2Mn3O7启发的混合铁磁-反铁磁相互作用，作者用精确对角化研究枫叶格上自旋1/2海森堡模型在铁磁边界附近的相图。研究未发现零场自旋向列相，但在铁磁边界附近识别出有序矢量连续演化的非公度自旋密度波区域，同时确认了共线Néel、倾斜120°和六边形单态相；变分Gutzwiller投影态测试未发现具竞争力的自旋液体描述，但在ruby格边界上Z2投影态较好地再现有限尺寸能量与关联。

item.title: 交替磁体/伊辛超导体结中的界面调控自旋过滤与非互易输运
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Arindam Boruah, Saumen Acharjee, Prasanta Kumar Saikia
该工作理论研究了具有自旋活性界面的交替磁体/伊辛超导体(AM/ISC)结中的自旋分辨输运、自旋过滤和非互易效应。基于修正的Bogoliubov-de Gennes框架和散射理论，表明内禀自旋-轨道耦合、各向异性AM自旋织构与自旋依赖界面散射的相互作用导致强烈的各向异性电荷与自旋电导。弱自旋混合区以螺旋度守恒输运为主，而增强的自旋-轨道耦合导致自旋选择性Andreev反射和有限自旋过滤；强自旋混合区则呈现增强的角各向异性和宽能量范围内的稳健自旋极化输运，同时常规Andreev反射被强烈抑制。非互易输运在单态超导相中持续存在。

item.title: 交变磁体中由晶体反幺正对称性驱动的节点拓扑超导
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Xiao Xiao, Arun Bansil
针对四重旋转共线交变磁体，发现晶体反幺正对称性TC₄z禁止纯自旋单态配对，并选出使BdG哈密顿量具有涌现手征对称性的配对结构。由此在宽参数区获得稳健的节点拓扑相，包括承载Majorana平带的节点点相及两类带手征Majorana边态的节点环相。即使该反幺正对称性自发破缺，节点结构仍保持，说明拓扑源于对称性受限的配对。文中提出可区分这些节点相的隧道谱学信号。

item.title: 奇异鞍点处的量子几何铁磁性
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Taisei Kitamura, Hiroki Nakai, Akito Daido, Youichi Yanase
该工作提出了一种发生于带触摸鞍点（奇异鞍点）电子体系中的铁磁性机制。奇异鞍点处发散的量子度量诱导铁磁关联，态密度的对数发散确保Stoner理论框架内的铁磁性，这是量子几何铁磁性的典型范例。二维t₂g轨道模型通过该机制容纳铁磁性，且与严格证明的平带铁磁性连续连接。

item.title: A nonlinear route to altermagnetism
item.description:
📚 Nature Nanotechnology
👤 Jian Tang, Qiong Ma
Nature Nanotechnology, Published online: 14 May 2026; doi:10.1038/s41565-026-02169-2 Nonlinear electrical responses reveal quantum geometry and signatures of altermagnetism in ruthenium dioxide thin films.

item.title: Picosecond ultralow-power switching device based on an antiferromagnet
item.description:
📚 AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
👤 Hanshen Tsai, Takuya Matsuda, Kouta Kondou, Kotaro Shimizu, Takuya Nomoto, Tomoya Higo,Takumi Matsuo, Yutaro Tsushima, Mihiro Asakura, Hanyi Peng, Daisuke Nishio-Hamane, Shogo Yamada, Rui Tang, Tetsuya Iizuka, Shinji Miwa, Ryotaro Arita, Mitsuru Takenaka, Satoru Nakatsuji
Science, Volume 392, Issue 6799, Page 761-765, May 2026.

item.title: 通过铬合金化实现二维MnSe中的反铁磁半金属
item.description:
📚 ScienceDirect
该工作基于第一性原理计算研究了二维MnSe经Cr合金化后的电子结构与磁性，提出一种反铁磁半金属态，为二维自旋电子学材料设计提供新思路。

item.title: 晶粒尺寸对多晶反铁电体储能性能影响的相场研究
item.description:
📚 ScienceDirect
该研究利用相场模拟系统考察了晶粒尺寸对多晶反铁电材料极化滞回行为及储能密度、储能效率的影响，揭示了显微组织–储能性能间的关联，详见原文。

item.title: Impact of Machine Learning on NMR-Based Permeability Prediction in Heterogeneous Carbonate Reservoir Analogs
item.description:
📚 Preprints
👤 Maurício Gabriel Lacerda Mafra, Milton Morais Xavier
Permeability prediction from Nuclear Magnetic Resonance (NMR) data remains challenging in carbonate rocks. Linear regression models, such as Schlumberger-Doll Research (SDR) and Han, rely on relatively homogeneous representations of the transverse relaxation time (T₂) distribution and often lose accuracy in carbonates affected by dissolution, fracturing, and karstification. This study compares the predictive performance of conventional regression models and supervised machine learning (ML) algorithms using exclusively NMR data. The analysis is based on a dataset of 494 carbonate core plugs collected from outcrop analogs of reservoir rocks from the Jandaíra Formation (Potiguar Basin, northeastern Brazil). Three ML algorithms, Random Forest Regressor (RFR), Gradient Boosting Regressor (GBR)…

item.title: [ASAP] Strain and Magnetic Field Engineering of Skyrmion in the CrSCl Monolayer
item.description:
📚 ACS
👤 Yiqi Huo, Luo Yan, Shuo Li, and Liujiang Zhou
The Journal of Physical Chemistry Letters DOI: 10.1021/acs.jpclett.6c01012

item.title: 过掺杂 Co₀.₃₃₆TaS₂ 中具有空间交替自旋标量手性的 3Q 磁有序
item.description:
📚 Editors' Suggestions
👤 Woonghee Cho, Pyeongjae Park, Chaebin Kim, Yeochan An, Kazuki Iida, Ryoichi Kajimoto, Sakib Matin, Romain Sibille, Scott A. Crooker, and Je-Geun Park
针对过掺杂 Co₀.₃₃₆TaS₂ 不显示拓扑霍尔效应的现象，作者结合非弹性中子散射与光学二色性等多手段，提出其磁基态为三 Q 序而非简单螺旋序。该态中自旋标量手性在空间上交替分布，从而抵消了宏观霍尔响应，为探测常规输运难以发现的隐藏多 Q 自旋结构提供了新思路。

item.title: 阴离子有序触发的硫族化合物 Janus 铁电性
item.description:
📚 Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
👤 Zhiguo Li, Qiang Li, Jinpeng Cao, Xiaoge Wang, Xiang Xu, Jochi Tseng, Peixi Zhang, Jinxia Deng, Kun Lin, Tianyou Zhai, Xianran Xing
该研究报道在硫族化合物中通过阴离子有序排列触发的 Janus 型铁电性，揭示了阴离子序在打破对称性、产生面外极化中的关键作用，为非氧化物铁电体的设计提供了新思路。具体材料体系与性能详见原文。

item.title: 类反铁电高熵超顺电体实现多层电容器的超高储能性能
item.description:
📚 Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
👤 Haonan Peng, Tengfei Hu, Zhen Liu, Teng Lu, Zhichao Hong, Zhonghui Shen, Yuanpeng Zhang, Yonghong Chen, Zhisheng Lin, Yun Liu, Genshui Wang, Junhao Chu
本文报道了一种具有类反铁电特征的高熵超顺电材料，并将其应用于多层陶瓷电容器以获得超高的储能密度与效率。详细机理与性能数据需查阅原文。

item.title: 铁电氧化铪锆薄膜中氧扩散的电极与微结构依赖性
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Liron Shvilberg, Thomas W. Pfeifer, Chuanzhen Zhou, Yong Kyu Choi, Duk‐Hyun Choe, Patrick E. Hopkins, Jon F. Ihlefeld
本文系统研究了铁电HfZrO薄膜中氧扩散行为对电极种类和薄膜微观结构的依赖性，揭示了氧迁移对器件耐久性和铁电性能的影响，为优化铁电存储器件可靠性提供指导。

item.title: 范德华反铁磁体中的巨磁塞贝克效应
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Yu Wu, Jie Yang, Haoran Guo, Zhongchong Lin, Yanran Sun, Hansheng Xu, Yu Ye, Licong Peng, Wenyun Yang, Rui Wu, Jinbo Yang, Zhaochu Luo
本工作在一种范德华反铁磁体中观测到巨大的磁塞贝克效应，磁场可显著调制其热电电压。结果为利用层状磁性材料开发自旋热电器件提供了新思路。

item.title: 基于第一性原理研究磁序对Nb(110)表面Mn层近邻诱导超导的影响
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. B
👤 Sohair ElMeligy, Balázs Újfalussy, and Kyungwha Park
作者利用最新发展的超导异质结Bogoliubov–de Gennes求解器，从第一性原理出发研究Mn-Nb(110)异质结中Mn层的近邻诱导超导态。重点考察了Mn层不同磁序对超导配对的影响，揭示磁性与超导性的相互作用机制。

item.title: Altermagnetic 超导体内禀的动量依赖能隙结构
item.description:
📚 Editors' Suggestions
👤 Christian L. H. Rasmussen, Jannik Gondolf, Mats Barkman, Mercè Roig, Daniel F. Agterberg, Andreas Kreisel, and Brian M. Andersen
作者基于微观模型研究 altermagnetic 金属中的超导态，强调了亚晶格自由度的重要性。结果表明，尽管裸相互作用与动量无关，altermagnetic 态的亚晶格极化仍会在超导能隙上印刻出各向异性结构，并在布里渊区边界产生节点。在大自旋劈裂极限下，较长程的同亚晶格配对会有利于非幺正等自旋三重态超导。

item.title: 呼吸型烧绿石尖晶石 AgInCr₄S₈ 单晶的磁性
item.description:
📚 Editors' Suggestions
👤 Andrew F. May, Christopher M. Pasco, V. O. Garlea, Karolina Gornicka, Matthias D. Frontzek, Xiaoping Wang, Pyeongjae Park, and Andrew D. Christianson
作者成功生长了 AgInCr₄S₈ 单晶，发现其物理性质对生长条件（尤其是硫蒸气压）十分敏感。单晶中子衍射确认了 A 位有序排列，并揭示出可用简单螺旋结构描述的非公度磁基态。基于相关化合物的阳离子尺寸趋势，作者指出该体系接近 A 位有序稳定性的上限，为呼吸型烧绿石的实验研究提供了模型体系。

item.title: 通过对称性工程在范德瓦尔斯异质结中多维调控交替磁性
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. B
👤 Xin Chen, Jingbiao Yuan, Haiyu Meng, Shibo Fang, Yee Sin Ang, Xiong-Xiong Xue, Ke-Qiu Chen, and Li-Ming Tang
研究铁电衬底如何通过对称性破缺在反铁磁材料中诱导交替磁性（altermagnetism），实现无净磁化的非相对论自旋劈裂。提出借助衬底极化、堆叠方式等多维度操控自旋劈裂大小与方向的方案，为微型化自旋电子器件提供设计思路。

item.title: Parallel Scan Recurrent Neural Quantum States for Scalable Variational Monte Carlo
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Ejaaz Merali, Mohamed Hibat-Allah, Mohammad Kohandel, Richard T. Scalettar, Ehsan Khatami
arXiv:2605.13807v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Neural-network quantum states have emerged as a powerful variational framework for quantum many-body systems, with recent progress often driven by massively parallel architectures such as transformers. Recurrent neural network quantum states, however, are frequently regarded as intrinsically sequential and therefore less scalable. Here we revisit this view by showing that modern recurrent architectures can support fast, accurate, and computationally accessible neural quantum state simulations. Using autoregressive recurrent wave functions together with recent advances in parallelizable recurrence, we develop variational ansätze, called parallel scan recurrent neural quantum states (PSR-NQS), which can be trained efficiently within variationa…

item.title: Topological and morphological signatures of disorder in a self-assembled, soft matter sponge network
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Xueyang Feng, Suman S. Kulkarni, Michael S. Dimitriyev, Dani S. Bassett, Randall D. Kamien, Edwin L. Thomas, Gregory M. Grason
arXiv:2605.12889v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Many soft matter systems exhibit ordered, polycontinuous network morphologies, such as the cubic (double) gyroid or diamond, as well as disordered network morphologies known generically as ``random sponges". While presumed to share similar local packing geometry, the structural relationship between these ordered and disordered network morphologies has remained obscure. We use slice and view scanning electron microscopy to analyze and compare multi-scale morphological features of an ordered double-gyroid morphology to the amorphous sponge morphology formed in the same block copolymer sample. We find that node valence of the minority component network of the sponge is mostly gyroidal (trivalent), with a small fraction of diamond-like (tetraval…

item.title: 多GPU量子电路模拟及网络性能的影响
item.description:
📚 ScienceDirect
本文研究了基于多GPU的量子电路模拟方法，重点分析了节点间网络性能对大规模量子模拟效率与可扩展性的影响。作者评估了不同网络配置下的通信开销，并探讨了优化分布式量子模拟性能的策略。

item.title: Do Hopfield Networks Dream of Stored Patterns? A Statistical-Mechanical Theory of Dreaming in Multidirectional Associative Memories
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Adriano Barra, Fabrizio Durante, Andrea Ladiana, Michela Marra Solazzo
arXiv:2605.13721v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We introduce the Dreaming L-directional Associative Memory (DLAM), a multi-layer Hebbian architecture in which off-line dreaming and supervised heteroassociative coupling coexist within a single energy function, placing our approach within the framework of energy-based models (EBMs). The replica-symmetric free energy, derived via the Guerra interpolation scheme, yields self-consistency equations governing the order parameters across the control-parameter space. The effective local field decomposes into signal, intra-layer dreaming noise, and inter-layer noise. Dreaming improves retrieval by differentially attenuating high-eigenvalue interference modes of the empirical correlation matrix, suppressing inter-pattern crosstalk while preserving t…

item.title: Topology-Preserving Neural Operator Learning via Hodge Decomposition
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Dongzhe Zheng, Tao Zhong, Christine Allen-Blanchette
arXiv:2605.13834v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: In this paper, we study solution operators of physical field equations on geometric meshes from a function-space perspective. We reveal that Hodge orthogonality fundamentally resolves spectral interference by isolating unlearnable topological degrees of freedom from learnable geometric dynamics, enabling an additive approximation confined to structure-preserving subspaces. Building on Hodge theory and operator splitting, we derive a principled operator-level decomposition. The result is a Hybrid Eulerian-Lagrangian architecture with an algebraic-level inductive bias we call Hodge Spectral Duality (HSD). In our framework, we use discrete differential forms to capture topology-dominated components and an orthogonal auxiliary ambient space to r…

item.title: Controllable Quantum Memory Capacity in Quantum Reservoir Networks with Tunable partial-SWAPs
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Erik L. Connerty, Ethan N. Evans
arXiv:2605.12713v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: In the field of quantum reservoir computing (QRC), many different computational models and architectures have been proposed. From these models, we identify feedback based models -- which use a feedback mechanism to re-embed classical measurements from the QRC -- and recurrent models -- which use a multi-register approach with memory and readout qubits -- as the two major competing architectures that have been discussed and validated on hardware. In this paper, we advance upon the recurrent architectures, which employ a two register approach to endow the QRC with a fading memory. While these approaches have been validated on hardware and have demonstrated great real-world performance on noisy-intermediate-scale-quantum (NISQ) quantum proces…

item.title: Neural QAOA²: Differentiable Joint Graph Partitioning and Parameter Initialization for Quantum Combinatorial Optimization
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Zubin Zheng, Jiahao Wu, Shengcai Liu
arXiv:2605.13072v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: The quantum approximate optimization algorithm (QAOA) holds promise for combinatorial optimization but is constrained by limited qubits. While divide-and-conquer frameworks like QAOA² address scalability by partitioning graphs into subgraphs, existing methods suffer from two fundamental limitations: i) misalignment between heuristic partitioning metrics and quantum optimization goals, and ii) topology-blind parameter initialization that leads to optimization cold starts. To bridge these gaps, we propose Neural QAOA², an end-to-end differentiable framework that jointly generates graph partitions and initial parameters. By integrating a generative evaluative network (GEN), our method utilizes a differentiable quantum evaluator as a high-fide…

item.title: 树状拓扑网络的最优激励与测量模式
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Eduardo Mapurunga, Alexandre Sanfelici Bazanella
本文研究树状拓扑动态网络的最优激励与测量模式（EMP），即在激励和测量节点总数最少前提下使渐近协方差矩阵迹最优。作者引入部分信息矩阵概念以系统获取动态网络的信息矩阵，对一类称为'十字'的树形结构表明特定模块的精度依赖于待估参数大小，参数相等时优先激励；并扩展了支路独立性的拓扑条件，通过数值分析验证所提准则可作为最小EMP选择工具。

item.title: 机器学习辅助杂化泛函用于GaN器件高效电子结构计算
item.description:
📚 ScienceDirect
该工作围绕GaN器件的高效电子结构计算展开，采用机器学习辅助的杂化泛函方法。详情需查阅原文以获取具体的计算方法、性能提升数据及器件应用结果。

item.title: HLS-Seek：通过代理比较奖励强化学习实现QoR感知的高层综合代码生成
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Qingyun Zou, Feng Yu, Hongshi Tan, Yao Chen, Bingsheng He, WengFai Wong
针对现有基于LLM的HLS方法仅关注功能正确性而忽视QoR的不足，作者提出HLS-Seek，用比较代理奖励模型替代昂贵的综合循环RL，Pareto支配判别准确率达99.53%。引入基于MC Dropout不确定性感知的切换机制，对低置信候选调用真实Vitis HLS综合并在线更新代理。7B参数模型在HLS-eval上达到81.5% pass@1语法正确率和81.4% Func@5，超越GPT-5.1，训练速度比真实奖励RL快8.5倍。

item.title: [ASAP] Constructing Moisture-Induced Degradation Pathways in Metal-Oxide Resists from Two-Phase Active Learning of Deep Potential Model
item.description:
📚 ACS
👤 Seungtae Kim, Je-Yeon Jung, Minwoo Kim, Youngmin Nam, Yoonhyun Kwak, Min Young Ha, and Won Bo Lee
Journal of Chemical Theory and Computation DOI: 10.1021/acs.jctc.6c00457

item.title: 利用CALPHAD计算的神经网络代理加速MOX燃料热化学建模：与SCIANTIX的集成
item.description:
📚 ScienceDirect
该研究构建神经网络代理模型替代耗时的CALPHAD热化学计算，并将其集成至SCIANTIX燃料性能程序，以加速混合氧化物（MOX）核燃料的热化学行为模拟，详细实现与精度评估见原文。

item.title: 无人机-可重构智能表面辅助车载通信网络的AoI最小化
item.description:
📚 Preprints
👤 Xiaolin Liang, Wang Jia, Qingqing Zhao, Wenhua Chen
该研究提出无人机-可重构智能表面辅助的车载通信网络，利用无人机机动性和RIS可编程反射增强高动态车载环境的通信可靠性与时效性。以信息年龄作为系统性能关键指标，构建联合优化问题，通过自适应控制无人机轨迹和RIS相移最小化AoI。提出基于深度强化学习的双策略软演员-评论家算法求解该优化问题，生成AoI最小化的最优决策，并与现有方法对比分析了AoI和传输速率性能。

item.title: Spatiotemporal downscaling and nowcasting of urban land surface temperatures with deep neural networks
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Solomiia Kurchaba, Angela Meyer
arXiv:2605.13566v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Land Surface Temperature (LST) is a key variable for various applications, such as urban climate and ecology studies. Yet, existing satellite-derived LST products provide either high spatial or high temporal resolution, resulting in a fundamental trade-off between the two. To address this trade-off, we combine observations from a geostationary and a polar orbiting satellite and provide LST fields at high spatial and high temporal resolution (1 km at 15-min intervals). We demonstrate their application for intraday forecasting of LSTs. To estimate LST fields at high spatiotemporal resolution, a U-Net model is trained to map LST fields from SEVIRI/MSG (3 km and 15 min resolution) to LST fields from Terra/Aqua MODIS (1 km, 4 overpasses per day)…

item.title: LightSplit：基于正交投影的实用隐私保护分裂学习
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Mert Cihangiroglu, Alessandro Pegoraro, Phillip Rieger, Antonino Nocera, Ahmad-Reza Sadeghi
针对分裂学习中切层激活的通信开销与重构攻击风险，作者提出LightSplit，在切层应用轻量化固定正交随机投影。基于香农信息论，该投影作为信息瓶颈限制实例特定信息并抑制可利用的逐样本信号。传输低维投影替代原始激活，服务器无需架构修改即可处理，客户端不引入额外可训练组件，兼容现有SL架构。

item.title: Grassmann tensor networks
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Jian-Gang Kong, Jia-Ji Zhu, Z. Y. Xie
arXiv:2605.12907v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Developing non-perturbative methods to reveal exotic properties of strongly correlated fermionic systems remains one of the most essential tasks of theoretical physics. Tensor network methods with Grassmann algebra offer powerful numerical tools for fermionic many-body systems in the coherent-state path-integral representation. Despite their vast potential for both condensed-matter and particle-physics communities, Grassmann tensor network methods are somewhat underexploited in practical simulations. In this work, we provide a detailed, self-contained introduction to Grassmann tensor network methods, from the basics of the Grassmann tensor operations to the Grassmannization of typical tensor network algorithms. Furthermore, the resulting Gra…

item.title: Extracting average properties of disordered spin chains with translationally invariant tensor networks
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Kevin Vervoort, Wei Tang, Nick Bultinck
arXiv:2504.21089v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We develop a tensor network-based method for calculating disorder-averaged expectation values in random spin chains without having to explicitly sample over disorder configurations. The algorithm exploits statistical translation invariance and works directly in the thermodynamic limit. We benchmark our method on the infinite-randomness critical point of the random transverse field Ising model.

item.title: Emergent Topology of Optimal Networks for Synchrony
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Guram Mikaberidze, Dane Taylor
arXiv:2509.18279v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Designing high-performing networks requires optimizing for functionality while respecting physical, geometric, or budget constraints. Yet, mathematical and computational tools to design such systems remain limited, particularly for collective dynamics arising from heterogeneous dynamical units. Here, we develop a gradient-based optimization framework to identify synchrony-optimal weighted networks under a constrained coupling budget. The resulting networks exhibit counterintuitive properties: they are sparse, bipartite, elongated, and extremely monophilic (i.e., the neighbors of any node are similar to one another while differing from the node itself). These structural patterns persist across dynamical models ranging from the power…

item.title: U-HNO: A U-shaped Hybrid Neural Operator with Sparse-Point Adaptive Routing for Non-stationary PDE Dynamics
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Yingzhe Ma, Xiao Yang, Yuxin Xie, Zihan Xiong, Jinliang Liu
arXiv:2605.12965v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Solutions to many partial differential equations (PDEs) display coexisting smooth global transport and localized sharp features within a single trajectory: shock fronts, thin interfaces, and concentrated high-frequency content sit on top of slowly varying backgrounds. This poses a challenge for neural operators: Fourier-based architectures mix nonlocal interactions efficiently but tend to under-resolve localized non-smooth features, whereas spatially local architectures recover fine detail at the cost of long-range propagation and rollout stability. Existing hybrid operators paper over this tension with a fixed, spatially uniform fusion that forces the same trade-off everywhere. We propose U-HNO, a U-shaped hybrid neural operator whose centr…

item.title: 用于电动汽车SOC预测的Tucker-LSTM混合张量网络模型
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Han Wang, Ying Wang, Bing Wang
作者提出将Tucker张量分解与LSTM网络结合的混合方法，利用电动汽车全生命周期实地数据进行SOC预测，输入包括充电状态、里程、电压电流、电池单元差异及时间特征。Tucker分解在保持时序结构的同时降维。实验中Tucker-LSTM全面优于基线LSTM：MSE降低70.5%，MAE改善48.7%，R²由0.918升至0.976。

item.title: 通过FABF4驱动相再分布在柔性准二维钙钛矿太阳能电池中构建软硬互穿网络
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Jishan Shi, Yichen Li, Chunmei Jia, Zhi Wan, Liming Du, Yanfang Ding, Can Li, Zhen Li
本文利用FABF4诱导准二维钙钛矿薄膜中的相再分布，构建软硬互穿网络结构，从而提升柔性钙钛矿太阳能电池的效率与机械稳定性。
